formPrompt: Use coral begonia leaf as the primary botanical form: asymmetric wing-like leaf, dotted surface, crisp outline, and decorative botanical graphic quality.
translationPrompt: Translate it into an asymmetric glass or metal shade with subtle perforations or speckled translucency, casting refined dotted shadows.
